title: Overgrown Vegetation
description: increases the amount of grass generated and lets grass blocks naturally grow grass over time
body:
# Overgrown Vegetation
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a21c9872a3f84bbce80facbcd22fb8e297da3337_0.webp)

## Overview
> Makes your world more overgrown by changing the amount of grass generated and allowing grass blocks to naturally grow new grass over time.


## Features

- Grass blocks now naturally grow grass over time. speed increases during rain
- increases the amount of grass in your Minecraft world
